recipe.title: Classic tomato spaghetti
recipe.description: The classic tomato spaghetti is a simple dish that makes the perfect midweek meal for the whole family and that can easily be added to once mastered.

ingredients.name: ripe tomatoes or 2 x 400g tins of quality chopped tomatoes

steps.descr: Pick the basil leaves onto a chopping board (reserving a...
steps.instructions: Pick the basil leaves onto a chopping board (reserving a few baby leaves to garnish), then roughly chop the remaining leaves and finely chop the stalks.

on_enter.say: Pick the basil leaves onto a chopping board (reserving a few baby leaves to garnish), then roughly chop the remaining leaves and finely chop the stalks.

steps.descr: Peel and finely slice the onion and garlic
steps.instructions: Peel and finely slice the onion and garlic. If using fresh, cut the tomatoes in half, then roughly chop them or carefully open the tins of tomatoes.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely slice the onion and garlic. If using fresh, cut the tomatoes in half, then roughly chop them or carefully open the tins of tomatoes.

steps.descr: Put a saucepan on a medium heat and add 1 tablespoon of...
steps.instructions: Put a saucepan on a medium heat and add 1 tablespoon of olive oil and the onion, then cook for around 7 minutes, or until soft and lightly golden.

on_enter.say: Put a saucepan on a medium heat and add 1 tablespoon of olive oil and the onion, then cook for around 7 minutes, or until soft and lightly golden.

steps.descr: Stir in the garlic and basil stalks for a few minutes,...
steps.instructions: Stir in the garlic and basil stalks for a few minutes, then add the fresh or tinned tomatoes and the vinegar.

on_enter.say: Stir in the garlic and basil stalks for a few minutes, then add the fresh or tinned tomatoes and the vinegar.

steps.descr: Season with a tiny pinch of salt and pepper, then...
steps.instructions: Season with a tiny pinch of salt and pepper, then continue cooking for around 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.

on_enter.say: Season with a tiny pinch of salt and pepper, then continue cooking for around 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.

steps.descr: Stir in the chopped basil leaves, then reduce to low and...
steps.instructions: Stir in the chopped basil leaves, then reduce to low and leave to tick away. Meanwhile…

on_enter.say: Stir in the chopped basil leaves, then reduce to low and leave to tick away. Meanwhile…

steps.descr: Carefully fill a large pot three-quarters of the way up...
steps.instructions: Carefully fill a large pot three-quarters of the way up with boiling water, add a tiny pinch of salt and bring back to the boil.

on_enter.say: Carefully fill a large pot three-quarters of the way up with boiling water, add a tiny pinch of salt and bring back to the boil.

steps.descr: Add the spaghetti and cook according to packet...
steps.instructions: Add the spaghetti and cook according to packet instructions – you want to cook your pasta until it is al dente. This translates as ‘to the tooth’ and means that it should be soft enough to eat, but still have a bit of a bite and firmness to it. Use the timings on the packet instructions as a guide, but try some just before the time is up to make sure it’s perfectly cooked.

on_enter.say: Add the spaghetti and cook according to packet instructions – you want to cook your pasta until it is al dente. This translates as ‘to the tooth’ and means that it should be soft enough to eat, but still have a bit of a bite and firmness to it. Use the timings on the packet instructions as a guide, but try some just before the time is up to make sure it’s perfectly cooked.

steps.descr: Once the pasta is done, ladle out and reserve a cup of...
steps.instructions: Once the pasta is done, ladle out and reserve a cup of the cooking water and keep it to one side, then drain in a colander over the sink and tip the spaghetti back into the pot.

on_enter.say: Once the pasta is done, ladle out and reserve a cup of the cooking water and keep it to one side, then drain in a colander over the sink and tip the spaghetti back into the pot.

steps.descr: Stir the spaghetti into the sauce, adding a splash of...
steps.instructions: Stir the spaghetti into the sauce, adding a splash of the pasta water to loosen, if needed.

on_enter.say: Stir the spaghetti into the sauce, adding a splash of the pasta water to loosen, if needed.

steps.descr: Serve with the reserved basil leaves sprinkled over the...
steps.instructions: Serve with the reserved basil leaves sprinkled over the top and use a microplane to finely grate the Parmesan cheese, then sprinkle over.

on_enter.say: Serve with the reserved basil leaves sprinkled over the top and use a microplane to finely grate the Parmesan cheese, then sprinkle over.
